# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## AI DEBUGGING CONTRACT ROUTER
- Follow the debugging contract for any bugs, regressions, build failures, console errors, failing tests, or short commands like "fix this".
- Read and adhere to [.ai/keyword-router.md](file:///c:/Users/USER/Desktop/_ref_flowkit/.ai/keyword-router.md).
- Do not attempt to patch code without first establishing failure evidence and root cause.
- Provide a validation and diff summary for every fix.
- Work through branch/PR style when applicable.
